title: Design System: CV Bangun Sarana Makmur — Web

display.purpose: Hero and section statements; engineered, infrastructure-grade.

body.purpose: All running Bahasa text; legible at 30+ reader age.

label.purpose: CTAs, product tags, table heads — never a per-section eyebrow.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Resting cards and sticky header separation.

shadows.name: ambient-lift
shadows.purpose: Hover/focus raise on cards and primary buttons.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single strongest signal on the page — CTAs like 'Minta Penawaran' / 'Hubungi via WhatsApp'.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #b3261e; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8125rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 14px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #8f1d17; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(27,30,35,0.08), 0 16px 40px rgba(27,30,35,0.10); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #b3261e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action beside a primary CTA (e.g. 'Email Kami').
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #b3261e; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8125rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 13px 27px; border: 1px solid #b3261e; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f7fa; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #b3261e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Project inquiry field; placeholder uses Slate Muted to clear 4.5:1.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #ffffff; color: #1b1e23; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; padding: 14px 16px; border: 1px solid #e3e7ee; border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #565d68; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #b3261e; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(179,38,30,0.15); }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Sticky white header; active route in BSM Red; CTA stays visible on mobile.
components.html:
CV Bangun Sarana Makmur
BerandaProdukJangkauanKontak
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; background: #ffffff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e3e7ee; padding: 14px 24px; } .ds-brand { font-family: Sora, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; color: #1b1e23; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .ds-nav-links a { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #1b1e23; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links a.is-active, .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #b3261e; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Catalog workhorse for BRC / Kawat Duri / Guard Rail. Flat at rest, Ambient Lift on hover.
components.html:
Pagar BRC Hot-Dip (HD)

Standar SNI · Lapisan Anti Karat HDG
components.css: .ds-card { background: #f5f7fa; border: 1px solid #e3e7ee; border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px; transition: box-shadow 320ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(27,30,35,0.08), 0 16px 40px rgba(27,30,35,0.10); } .ds-card-media { background: #e3e7ee; border-radius: 10px; aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Sora, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #1b1e23; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-card-spec { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #565d68; font-size: 0.9375rem; margin: 0 0 16px; }

components.name: Chip / Tag
components.description: Product category and spec tags (e.g. 'SNI', 'HDG Anti-Karat'). No colored side stripe.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: #f5f7fa; color: #1b1e23; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8125rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px; }

narrative.overview: BSM is a construction-materials distributor that pools products from multiple factories into a single, reliable one-stop source for contractors and projects. The visual system feels like civil infrastructure itself: solid, exact, quietly confident — the surface a procurement officer trusts on sight. Cool graphite and pure white carry the page; brand red is a precise signal, not decoration. Soft layered elevation conveys depth without weight. The system rejects the legacy cream-and-serif template and any flashy agency aesthetic, and is engineered for a 30+ B2B audience that scans for proof before it calls.
keyCharacteristics: Cool graphite ink on pure white; high-contrast, easy on the eye, legibility-first.
Brand red used as a deliberate signal (CTAs, key marks), never splashed as a wash.
Soft layered elevation; flat at rest, depth on hover/focus.
Real-world proof over invented polish: SNI-standard products, Surabaya-rooted 10+ years, nationwide Sabang–Merauke delivery.
Sora display + Inter body replaces the old serif; Bahasa copy stays clear and direct.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Brand red appears on ≤10% of any screen; its rarity makes a CTA unmistakable.

rules.name: The Cool-Only Rule
rules.body: Every neutral leans cool (graphite/blue undertone). No warm cream, beige, or paper.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: No tiny uppercase tracked kicker above every section heading; labels earn placement only on real UI.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Components rest flat with a hairline; shadows appear only on state change.

dos: Keep body text in Graphite Ink and secondary text in Slate Muted that clears 4.5:1.
Use BSM Red sparingly as the one signal: primary CTAs, active nav, key marks, links.
Cap prose at ~70ch and hero display at ≤4rem for a 30+ B2B reader.
Let depth come from soft layered shadows on hover/focus; keep resting surfaces flat.
Write direct, proof-led Bahasa copy; improvise phrasing over the old site's literal wording.
Use unique AI-generated project visuals if needed, distinct from generic stock.
donts: Use the generic 'AI cream + serif company-profile template' — the legacy baseline is the anti-reference.
Use flashy, over-designed agency aesthetics that sacrifice readability for effect.
Use stock-photo sameness; AI imagery must be unique and not interchangeable.
Place a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section heading.
Use a colored left/right border stripe >1px as a card or callout accent.
Use gradient text, glassmorphism, or pill-rounded cards (>14px radius).
Gate content visibility on a scroll/load animation.
Run motion without a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
Introduce a second chromatic accent beyond graphite/white/red.
